raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "winna ohtru Reift ne bij wai-
jaga/ un tas nomirre. Bet Jo-
abs un winna Brahtis Abisajus
dfinnahs Seebam/ Bikra Deh-
lam pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un weens Wihrs no Jo-
aba Puifscheem palikte pee win-
na stahwohts/un fazzija: Kurſch
irr / kam labs Prahts irr pee
Joaba? un kurſch irr/ kas Dah-
widam (peeſerrahs) / laid tas
eet Joabam pakkat?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Amasus gulleja Af-
ſinis eewelts Eelas Widdû. Kad
nu tas Wihrs redſeja / ka wiſſi
Laudis tur pastahweja/ tad no-
wehle wiꞥſch Amasu no tahs
Eelas us Tihrunu / un mette
Drchbes us winnu / tapehz ka
tas redſeja / ka ikkatrs / kas pee
winna nahze/ pastahweja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad wiꞥſch nu no Eelas
bija nowelts / tad gahje wiſſi
Laudis prohjam Joabam pak-
kat/ Seebam Bikra Dehlam
pakkatdsihdainees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch gahje zaur wiſ-
fahm Israëta Ziltim uhs Abbe-
In jeb BetMäiku/ unzaur wiſſu
Teefu Berim/un tee fapulzejahs/
un nahze winnam pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahze / un apmet-
tehs prett winnu Abelā Bet
Maäkā/ un uſinette weenn Wal-
li prett to Pilsfahtu/ un peestah-
jehs pee Muhreeim/ un wiſſi Lau-
dis/ kas pee Joaba bija/ peelan-
sahs to Muhri apgahst.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fauze weena gudra
Seewa no ta Pilsfahta: Klan-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "tajt/ klanſajt/ faſſajt jelle Joa-
bam : Nahz teju / es ar tew
ruunaschnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad wiꞥſch nu pee tahs
nahze / tad fazzija ta Seewa:
Eſti tu Joabs? un wiꞥſch fazzi-
ja: Es efimu tas. Un ta fazzi-
ja us winnu : Klaufi tawas
Kalpones Wallodu / un wiꞥſch
fazzija: Es klausu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja winna / un
fazzija: Wezzôs Laikôs tappe ta
runnahts un fazzihts: Kas grib
waizaht / lai tas Abela waiza /
un tad labbi isdewahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Es efimu weens no feem
meerigeem un pectizzigeem Isra-
etā (Pilsfahteem) / un tu mekle
tahdu Pilsfahtu nomaitaht/ kas
weena Mahte irr eekſch Israëta
Rapehz gribbt tu ta KUNGA
Teefu apricht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildeja Joabs / un
fazzija : Ne muhschain / ka es
buhtu aprihjis/ un ka es buhtu
nomaitajs/ tas ta ne irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet weens Wihrs no Ge-
wrāima Kalneem Seebus Wahr-
da/ Bikra Dehls / tas irr jawu
Rohku prett to Kehnimu / prett
Dahwidu pazehlis/ dohdeet man
winnu ween/ tad es eefhu nohst
no Pilsfahta. Tad fazzija ta
Seewa us Joabu: Naugi/ win-
na Galwa taps pee tew pahr to
Muhri mesta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ta Seewa nahze pee
wiſſeem Laudim ar jawu Sudri-
bu. Un tee nozirte Seebain Bik-
ra Dehlam to Galwu/ un iſmette
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
